name: TAMALA COLEMAN
seeking: TAMALA COLEMAN is seeking JV partners who serve individuals and couples who want to deepen their personal connections and improve relational health through conscious coaching. Partners in couples therapy, personal development retreats, or communication skills training whose clients recognize relationship quality as foundational to their wellbeing would be strong referral sources. Co-promotion with dating coaches, spiritual community leaders, or interpersonal communication trainers whose audiences are actively working to improve the quality of their relationships would be the most productive JV channel.
who_you_serve: Individuals and couples seeking relationship coaching and personal connection support.
what_you_do: Focus on relationship development and conscious connection building.
offering: Relationship coaching for personal and professional connections.
bio: TAMALA COLEMAN leads TAMALA COLEMAN. They are dedicated to delivering exceptional results for their clients.
service_provided: Magazine publishing, podcast hosting, coaching, consulting, community outreach, product sales (jewelry)
social_proof: Author, Podcast Host, CEO of NSpire Christian Magazine, Independent Business Associate/Consultant with Paparazzi (Majestic Jewels)
business_focus: Focus on relationship development and conscious connection building. (Relationship development coaching)
